events.content: Implemented GitHub actions as adapter-driven REST helpers: Implemented GitHub actions as adapter-driven REST helpers

raw.question: Implemented GitHub actions as adapter-driven REST helpers
raw.chosen: Implemented GitHub actions as adapter-driven REST helpers
raw.reasoning: The existing local and cloud runtimes already share a request(method,path,options) abstraction, so action modules can work across gh CLI and Nango without runtime-specific branches.

retrospective.summary: Implemented GitHub primitive repository, issue, pull request, and file actions with adapter-backed local/cloud runtime support plus a typed GitHubClient facade.
